heading: Vector Embeddings
body:
The vector embeddings in the `sample_mflix.embedded_movies` collection
and in the example query were created using the Voyage AI `voyage-3-large`
embedding model. Your embedding model choice informs the vector dimensions
and vector similarity function you use in your vector search index. You can
use any [embedding model](avs-key-concepts) you like, and
experiment with different models as accuracy can vary between models
depending on your specific use case.

To learn how to create vector embeddings of your own data, see
[How to Create Vector Embeddings Manually](create-vector-embeddings).

The vector embeddings in the `sample_mflix.embedded_movies` collection
and in the example query were created using the Voyage AI `voyage-3-large`
embedding model. Your choice of embedding model informs the vector dimensions
and vector similarity function you use in your vector search index. You can
use any [embedding model](avs-key-concepts) you like, and
experiment with different models as accuracy can vary between models
depending on your specific use case.

To learn how to create vector embeddings of your own data, see
[How to Create Vector Embeddings Manually](create-vector-embeddings).

The vector embeddings for the `fullplot` field and the example query against
the `fullplot` field in the `sample_mflix.embedded_movies` collection were
created using the Voyage AI API (Application Programming Interface) keys. The embeddings for the field and the
query text against the field use the model, `voyage-4`, specified in the
index definition for the field. You can use any [embedding model](avs-key-concepts) in the query.

To learn how to automatically generate vector embeddings for your data and
natural language queries against your data, see [How to Automatically Generate Embeddings](avs-auto-embeddings).
